subject: You are in. Here is what to expect from us.
preheader: A quick introduction to FarmThru, the farms we work with, and what comes next.
body:
Welcome.

You have just joined the waitlist for FarmThru's equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal, launching mid-2026.

Before we go any further, a proper introduction.

FarmThru is a grocery store. Not a meal kit. Not a box you cannot customise. A farm-direct grocery store where every product comes from a named regenerative farm in NSW.

You order online. Your food goes from the farm to our Brookvale hub. You collect it days later, not weeks. No middlemen marking it up. No mystery about where it came from.

Over the next couple of weeks, we will introduce you to the farms, the food, the team, and the investment opportunity. No fluff. Just the information you need to decide if this is something you want to be part of.

If you are in Sydney, the Brookvale hub is open Monday to Friday. You do not have to wait for the campaign to try the food.

We will show you where your food comes from.

Rachel & the FarmThru team
creative_brief: Clean welcome email. FarmThru logo header. Single CTA button linking to the shop. Brief, warm, expectation-setting. Simple product hero shot below the logo. No clutter.
